answer: The Google Ads API is free to use at all access levels, including Basic and Standard access [1][2]. There is no paid tier for the API itself; however, you must obtain a developer token through your Google Ads manager account and apply for the appropriate access level based on your operational needs [2][3]. While there are no charges for API usage, you may be subject to non-compliance fees if you fail to meet Required Minimum Functionality requirements during an audit of your tool [1][2]. You can manage your access and token application via the API Center in your Google Ads manager account [3][4].
